channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Canada proposes crypto political donation ban over foreign interference fears
item.description: A similar bill was proposed in 2024 but it failed to advance past the second reading in the House of Commons and ultimately died before it could become law.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Kalshi legal woes grow with Washington state gambling suit
item.description: The Washington attorney general became the latest state authority to sue Kalshi, alleging on Friday that the prediction markets operator violated state regulations.

item.title: Tokenized platform xStocks brings new private shares fund on-chain
item.description: The closed-end Fundrise Innovation Fund holds stakes in private technology companies including Anthropic, Databricks and SpaceX, and came public earlier this month.

item.title: Crypto needs a reset before the next bull run
item.description: The industry’s most significant opportunities are being forged during this period of uncomfortable volatility. Here’s why, argues Grider.

item.title: Washington sues Kalshi as states ramp up legal pressure against prediction markets
item.description: The Washington state attorney general alleged Kalshi offers "gambling products" products dressed up as prediction markets in a lawsuit Friday.

item.title: Kalshi secures license to offer margin trading to institutional investors
item.description: Margin feature is a departure from traditional prediction markets, which typically require fully collateralized positions, and comes as the industry sees growing trading volumes and investment.

item.title: Canada moves to ban crypto donations for election campaigns following UK
item.description: Bill C-25 follows years of warnings from Canada's Chief Electoral Officer about the risk that crypto donations could pose to electoral integrity.

item.title: Why bitcoin's 'compressed' valuation offers reduced downside risk versus stocks
item.description: The recent surge in oil and gas prices has driven up inflation expectations, causing markets to adjust their bets on Federal Reserve rate cuts, with traders now pricing in a near 40% chance of no rate cuts this year.

item.title: Why GameStop Put $315 Million in Bitcoin Into a Covered Call Options Strategy
item.description: GameStop has pledged nearly all of its Bitcoin to a covered call strategy on Coinbase Prime to generate some yield.

item.title: Here's how bitcoin, Ethereum and other networks are preparing for the looming quantum threat
item.description: Across many of the most well-known ecosystems like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana, responses are diverging along familiar lines: what to do on social consensus and technical iteration, and community members are split between caution and acc…

item.title: Crypto's future is bright in the context of AI's assault on software firms, says Kraken-backed investment firm
item.description: Crypto’s latest bear cycle is a mere blip when compared with the existential threat AI now poses to traditional software services, says Ravi Tanuku, CEO of KRAKacquisition Corp.

item.title: The US 🇺🇸 just removed the Chinese from El Guri, Venezuela’s hydro dam and the third largest in the world; after Itaipú. Siemens and GE are now under contract to evaluate and rehabilitate Venezuela's dam and the entire national grid (SEN). This is not a rout - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0wODI5aDJQV05YMDJCenlQcWcxZlZVdUJXT09udlZSQ0pJRDM4WWxSdjlmNkFWWTNlSlRTLTIxZTBYazZaTVZqc19VbTd0SWU1ZmtHdEk3TThQUWQ1SW1Qa1pqLUdrZ0k?oc=5" target="_blank">The US 🇺🇸 just removed th…

item.title: Google plans to back $5B data center for Anthropic: Report
item.description: Google and lenders move to finance a $5 billion Texas data center for Anthropic as a US judge blocks a federal push to restrict the AI firm’s use.

item.title: How AI agents can reshape arbitrage in prediction markets
item.description: Arbitrage opportunities in prediction markets often exist for seconds, giving AI-driven systems a structural advantage over humans.

item.title: 📊 MARKET: The crypto market gained and lost $300B in about 20 days. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5IeHF2LUc3NG5tQ3BFTTNSZFd6cDVPLTJ6RjN6R1c2N3BvTHkzRlhrSlFjUWFaTjRqMnJPaU00Y0pBbjd5TFNjYVZ5bndYOG9xR1N4YTlBRkRyb2FxWFh0cmI5dU8?oc=5" target="_blank">📊 MARKET: The crypto market ga…

item.title: Here's what next as Anthropic's most powerful AI model leaked via unsecured data cache
item.description: A draft blog post left in an unsecured data cache revealed a new model tier called Capybara that Anthropic says is more capable than anything it has built, with the company flagging "unprecedented" cybersecurity risks.

item.title: Watch out Bitcoin devs. Google says post-quantum migration needs to happen by 2029.
item.description: The search giant set a corporate deadline to migrate all authentication services to quantum-resistant cryptography, validating the timeline Ethereum has been building toward for eight years. Bitcoin's response so far has been silence.

item.title: Warren probes China-based Bitmain over US security concerns: Report
item.description: US authorities launched the “Operation Red Sunset” probe into Bitmain last year over potential espionage and grid risks.

item.title: Potential Bitcoin crash below $60K may delay recovery to 2027: Data
item.description: Bitcoin's return to an all-time high depends on how deep the current selloff extends, as data shows each new price low adds months to BTC's recovery time.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs break 4-week inflow streak as capital avoids ‘directional risk’
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see $296 million in weekly outflows after a month-long inflow streak, as macro uncertainty keeps capital sidelined.

item.title: WHO OWNS THE MOST BITCOIN? Bitcoin ownership is concentrated across exchanges, ETFs, governments and whales. Arkham data shows Satoshi holds 1.096M BTC, while Coinbase (982K) and BlackRock (775K) lead institutions. Our research team brok - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5Jd2lpRHFDUkFJQjk1YW9jbzNESmlaREdiREt2aUZURjhPaGh5djYzS2ZWaXcyTWNNYzFuT2VlNlZZVGtQbXoxQU5ZRTJsUVVIRlZJZHQwNk91SFk?oc=5" target="_blank">WHO OWNS THE MOST BITCOIN? Bitcoin ownershi…

item.title: XRP risk-reward improves as whale accumulation rises: Will price follow?
item.description: XRP shows improving risk-adjusted returns alongside rising whale flows, but rising leverage use and repeat liquidations point to a fragile futures market.

item.title: BHUTAN IS SELLING BITCOIN - x.com
item.description: BHUTAN IS SELLING BITCOIN

item.title: Ripple turns to AI to stress-test the XRP Ledger as institutional use cases scale
item.description: The next XRP Ledger release will be dedicated entirely to bug fixes and improvements.

item.title: Lummis says CLARITY Act will deliver 'strongest' developer protections
item.description: Crypto lawyer Jake Chervinsky said legislation covering crypto developer protections has been overshadowed by the intense focus on stablecoin yield in the CLARITY Act.

item.title: Stablecoins will be crypto’s ‘ChatGPT moment’ for businesses: Ripple
item.description: Ripple’s Brad Garlinghouse noted that stablecoin trading volume soared to over $33 trillion in 2025, while Bloomberg predicted that stablecoin flows would hit $56.6 trillion by 2030.

item.title: Bitcoin miners are becoming AI companies and selling their BTC to fund the transition
item.description: The average public miner spent $79,995 to produce one bitcoin last quarter. Bitcoin is trading at $70,000. The math doesn't work, so the industry is pivoting to AI, taking on $70 billion in contracts, and liquidating bitcoin treasuries to …

item.title: Morgan Stanley sets 0.14% Bitcoin ETF fee, lowest in market if approved
item.description: Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas said Morgan Stanley’s 16,000 financial advisors, who manage $6.2 trillion in client assets, would have no problem recommending the product at such low fees.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says "Bitcoin is very powerful." "So many people now want to pay you in crypto." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1ZN2s1UGk0RzRQd29sT3RBckhBZGNyWUVURkY1VHdycXBndFZSUnRXVjFmOXJQYk9WLXlJZ0JTa0d5VWI4WFBxMHFndWdpNEM0bkJSZDN4TmxKamxGaDJmdkVn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says…

item.title: California governor signs order banning prediction market insider trading
item.description: The executive order is the latest in a wave of legal actions in the US seeking to curb government insider trading on prediction markets.

item.title: A sweep of the lows on #Bitcoin. Wouldn't be surprised if we'll test $58,000 as that's where the 200-Week MA is. Every cycle we'll be coming back to that level, and we mostly hold (unless we get a type of event as FTX where everything collapses even deeper). - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1UQmVKOWpNbGtlR1RySVlZQ3dOeWpURWxvTVdVd0VPXzJtY3MyWUtNNTRZQmx0Z1hLdUVKN2lOSjlVbUo2eGVtTlZrWGw3blBMUHpxYlVBMi1MYjdtRUNLNVhsdw?oc=5" target="_blank">A sweep of the lows on #Bitcoin.…

item.title: WOW. We have the fee on Morgan Stanley's spot bitcoin ETF $MSBT. Will charge just 0.14% !!! Big move here. They are not messing around. Likely to launch in early April. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9ReU0wcGhfVGZ1cHFiRE9WVmoyRTNIcFlYbEplT3d3Ymc1cGxJZ0RNaFlvLVp6bmwtWVdiekhwUXBwa1R6cExORDY4NjBMZW5lZ2hxcnQ0R2dIUXc?oc=5" target="_blank">WOW. We have the fee on Morgan Stanley's sp…

item.title: Bitcoin traders see 53% odds of sub-$66K BTC by April 24
item.description: Bitcoin price slumped on Friday as uncertainty over the US economy and war in Iran negatively impacted stock and crypto markets.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Stablecoin jitters meet institutional momentum
item.description: Regulatory uncertainty shakes stablecoins as institutions push forward, prediction markets tighten rules and AI agents reshape micropayment economics.

item.title: Morgan Stanley enters bitcoin ETF race with market-leading low fee
item.description: The bank priced its proposed spot bitcoin fund at 14 basis points, making it the lowest fund on the market, if approved.

item.title: P2P.me team discloses and apologizes for prediction market bets
item.description: The P2P.me team opened positions on the Polymarket prediction platform to wager whether the project would hit its $6 million fundraising goal.

item.title: Price predictions 3/27: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: Bitcoin and select major altcoins have turned down sharply, indicating that the bears are trying to take charge of the market.

item.title: Detroit set to enter Michigan‘s battle against Coinbase prediction markets
item.description: The US city is expected to pen an amicus brief in Coinbase's lawsuit against the state of Michigan, which the exchange filed ahead of its prediction markets launch.

item.title: 🇺🇸 JUST IN: U.S. lawmakers unveiled a draft crypto tax bill proposing a stablecoin exemption for transactions under $200 but excluding any Bitcoin tax exemption. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5sRmRYVEd0SDJlQWEtMDczaHlwaUdGNGFtX3RfUTl4MVJveC14WkJXTklaSzNUeFBkVUFVNW44M3pIYjZGWmFkUmlkWU0xejBvbmttMXlocEIzRThJZlY2Wk5fWHI?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 JUST IN: U.S. lawmakers un…

item.title: Anthropic's 'Most Capable' AI Model Claude Mythos Leaks, Deemed Major Cybersecurity Threat
item.description: Anthropic's next-generation model, dubbed Claude Mythos, is seen as a "step change" for AI—and potentially bad news for cybersecurity.

item.title: NYSE Parent Company Finalizes Polymarket Investment, Totaling $1.6 Billion
item.description: Intercontinental Exchange, the firm behind the New York Stock Exchange, invested a total of $1.6 billion into prediction market Polymarket.

item.title: US lawmakers publish crypto tax proposal without Bitcoin tax exemption
item.description: The bill proposes exempting dollar-pegged stablecoins from gains or losses if the tokens remain tightly pegged to the underlying fiat currency.

item.title: Strategy, BitMine and Robinhood Shares Hit Monthly Lows as Bitcoin Sinks Further
item.description: Bitcoin fell to its lowest price since March 2 on Friday as major crypto-related stocks like Strategy and BitMine suffered tougher losses.

item.title: Gavin Newsom Bans California Public Officials From Prediction Market Insider Trading
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed an executive order Friday to ban public officials from using inside info on prediction markets.

item.title: Why Mastercard paid double for stablecoin infrastructure it could have built
item.description: The credit card giant’s pricey payment to buy stablecoin platform, BVNK, says more than any strategy deck or earnings call ever could.

item.title: 'All to Play For': Walrus Hits 450TB of Data Stored Amid Renewed AI Push
item.description: The verifiable data platform is marking its one-year anniversary, with plans to double down on AI and onchain finance.

item.title: Crypto stocks battered as Nasdaq enters correction in $17 trillion market rout
item.description: The Friday plunge fits into a pattern since the war in Iran broke out, with gains on Monday turning into losses by the end of the week.

item.title: JUST IN: The #Bitcoin Fear and Greed Index is now at 13, "Extreme Fear" 👀 Be greedy when others are fearful ✊ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFA3Q0N0dDhYaXZ0ODhFaUpXZEYtY0RnMkVjRC1HYy1tdHJneDB0ZzlHN19HYWVCQUR3bWdHTDF0RVhRc2V5QUhqWHBZX3dFQ2gxc0tvSWttTkFDZllfYTFrUWRVM1FHejA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: The #Bitcoin Fear …

item.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Dumps Meta, Nvidia and Bitcoin ETF Shares in Major Tech Sell-Off
item.description: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest sold big chunks of its positions in American tech stocks and its own Bitcoin ETF as stocks and crypto slide.

item.title: Binance Australia Hit With $6.9M Fine After Investors Lose Millions on Derivatives
item.description: The penalty follows Binance’s admission that 524 retail investors lost $6 million trading high-risk derivatives without required protections.

item.title: Anthropic’s massive 'Claude Mythos' leak sends software names — and crypto — sharply lower
item.description: The model could significantly heighten cybersecurity risks by rapidly finding and exploiting software vulnerabilities, potentially accelerating a cyber arms race.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE drops 3.2% as nearly all constituents decline
item.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 0.8% from Thursday, was the only gainer.

item.title: Morning Minute: Fannie Mae Accepts Crypto for Mortgages
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $67k on war concerns, while Fannie Mae is finally allowing crypto in the mortgage process.

item.title: On average, around now is when #Bitcoin continues its decline in midterm years. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBUQjhmU2FSVUx4UUstMG9Wd0xReTB6M0Nob2U1dTNCMHhYY0RFYWUta3JFSXF3NkNoRUZOLTluSjdTZzBVcHFmaVFwcUxReWd3OU81VHhBU0ozOGlLTWtWb21mM2h1QjQ?oc=5" target="_blank">On average, around now is w…

item.title: NYSE owner doubles down on Polymarket with fresh $600 million investment
item.description: The parent company of the New York Stock Exchange is cementing its bet on the future of prediction markets, bringing its total commitment to nearly $2 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin Dips Under $67K as Geopolitical Uncertainty, Treasury Yields Spook Traders
item.description: Bitcoin dropped to a two-week low under $67,000 amid geopolitical uncertainty, rising Treasury yields, and heavy leveraged positioning.

item.title: Retail investors drive widespread bitcoin selling as prices fall
item.description: Glassnode data shows distribution across cohorts as BTC falls below $67,000, with whales remaining largely neutral.

item.title: Ondo, Canton sidestep macro concerns with institutional deals as bitcoin, ether slide
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 27, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin drops to two-week low as $300 million in longs are liquidated
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $67,000 and ether dropped toward $2,000 as equities weakened, oil topped $100 and leveraged longs unwound, signaling fragile sentiment.
